letter.title: [Letter] A Message from the Developers
letter.content: Hello, this is Tears Studio. As we begin this journey, we’d like to share our very first message with you. We look forward to hearing your valuable feedback.

letter.title: [Letter] Spring Update Plans
letter.content: Spring is just around the corner. We’d like to share more details about our upcoming roadmap and the direction we’re preparing for this season.

letter.title: [Letter] Data Integration Notice
letter.content: To improve system efficiency, our announcement system will be integrated. We’ll continue working to provide a smoother experience.

letter.title: [Letter] Community Feedback Update
letter.content: We are currently reviewing the community suggestions you’ve shared with us. We’ll bring you good news soon.

letter.title: [Letter] Service Stability Update
letter.content: We have completed backend improvements to enhance server stability. Thank you for your continued support.

letter.title: [Letter] Security Enhancement Notice
letter.content: We’ve strengthened our data protection system by implementing RSA digital signatures to prevent tampering.

letter.title: [Letter] New Team Members Joined
letter.content: New developers have joined Tears Studio! We’ll continue to deliver faster and better updates.

letter.title: [Letter] Beta Test Retrospective
letter.content: We sincerely thank you for your enthusiastic support during the beta test period.

contents.title: [Content] New Episode: Castle of Tears
contents.content: A new adventure begins! The “Castle of Tears” episode is now available. Jump in and explore it today.

contents.title: [Content] Limited-Time Avatar Release
contents.content: The limited-time “Tear Fairy” avatar set is now available in the shop.

contents.title: [Content] Mini Games Update
contents.content: Three new mini games have been added to the lobby. Compete for high scores!

contents.title: [Content] New Skill Trees Unlocked
contents.content: Tier 3 skill trees are now unlocked for all characters. Discover powerful new builds!

contents.title: [Content] Ranking System Added
contents.content: The world ranking system has been introduced. Climb to the top and earn your glory!

contents.title: [Content] Tutorial Revamp
contents.content: The tutorial has been redesigned to be more intuitive and beginner-friendly.

contents.title: [Content] Daily Quest Expansion
contents.content: Five new daily quests with improved rewards have been added.

contents.title: [Content] Cinematic Scenes Added
contents.content: New cinematic scenes have been added to enhance immersion in Chapter 1 of the main story.

fixes.title: [Patch] Week 1 of April Fixes
fixes.content: Fixed a reported scroll view bug. Data now refreshes properly when switching pages.

fixes.title: [Patch] Network Latency Improvements
fixes.content: Optimized and resolved data loading delays that occurred in certain environments.

fixes.title: [Patch] UI Text Overlap Fix
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where text overlapped in certain language settings.

fixes.title: [Patch] Sound Issue Fix
fixes.content: Resolved an issue where background music and sound effects would not play simultaneously.

fixes.title: [Patch] Item Usage Fix
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where certain items were not consumed properly from the inventory.

fixes.title: [Patch] Login Crash Fix
fixes.content: Resolved a critical issue where the app would occasionally crash when switching accounts.

fixes.title: [Patch] Image Loading Optimization
fixes.content: Improved logo image loading speed in announcements through caching enhancements.

fixes.title: [Patch] Launch Fixes
fixes.content: Various issues reported at launch have been addressed and fixed.
